'''ngochagaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:quadragenary|quadragenary]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-ch-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quadragenary|quadragenary]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ngochagaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngochagithi|ngochagithi]] || [[word:ngochagiji|ngochagiji]] || [[word:ngochagishi|ngochagishi]] || [[word:ngochagiki|ngochagiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngochaguthuthu|ngochaguthuthu]] || [[word:ngochagujuju|ngochagujuju]] || [[word:ngochagushushu|ngochagushushu]] || [[word:ngochagukuku|ngochagukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngochaguthu|ngochaguthu]] || [[word:ngochaguju|ngochaguju]] || [[word:ngochagushu|ngochagushu]] || [[word:ngochaguku|ngochaguku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngochagufthuf|ngochagufthuf]] || [[word:ngochagufjuf|ngochagufjuf]] || [[word:ngochagufshuf|ngochagufshuf]] || [[word:ngochagufkuf|ngochagufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngochagethe|ngochagethe]] || [[word:ngochageje|ngochageje]] || [[word:ngochageshe|ngochageshe]] || [[word:ngochageke|ngochageke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngochagothotho|ngochagothotho]] || [[word:ngochagojojo|ngochagojojo]] || [[word:ngochagoshosho|ngochagoshosho]] || [[word:ngochagokoko|ngochagokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngochagotho|ngochagotho]] || [[word:ngochagojo|ngochagojo]] || [[word:ngochagosho|ngochagosho]] || [[word:ngochagoko|ngochagoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngochagofthof|ngochagofthof]] || [[word:ngochagofjof|ngochagofjof]] || [[word:ngochagofshof|ngochagofshof]] || [[word:ngochagofkof|ngochagofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngochagĂŻfthĂŻf|ngochagĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngochagĂŻfjĂŻf|ngochagĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngochagĂŻfshĂŻf|ngochagĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngochagĂŻfkĂŻf|ngochagĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngochagĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|ngochagĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngochagĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|ngochagĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngochagĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|ngochagĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngochagĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|ngochagĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngochagĂŻfthĂŻf|ngochagĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngochagĂŻfjĂŻf|ngochagĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngochagĂŻfshĂŻf|ngochagĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngochagĂŻfkĂŻf|ngochagĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngochagĂŻfthĂŻf|ngochagĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngochagĂŻfjĂŻf|ngochagĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngochagĂŻfshĂŻf|ngochagĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngochagĂŻfkĂŻf|ngochagĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngochagĂŠthĂŠ|ngochagĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:ngochagĂŠjĂŠ|ngochagĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:ngochagĂŠshĂŠ|ngochagĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:ngochagĂŠkĂŠ|ngochagĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngochagathatha|ngochagathatha]] || [[word:ngochagajaja|ngochagajaja]] || [[word:ngochagashasha|ngochagashasha]] || [[word:ngochagakaka|ngochagakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngochagatha|ngochagatha]] || [[word:ngochagaja|ngochagaja]] || [[word:ngochagasha|ngochagasha]] || [[word:ngochagaka|ngochagaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngochagafthaf|ngochagafthaf]] || [[word:ngochagafjaf|ngochagafjaf]] || [[word:ngochagafshaf|ngochagafshaf]] || [[word:ngochagafkaf|ngochagafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:ngochagasha|ngochagasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngochagshĂ«asha|ngochagshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngochagroasha|ngochagroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngochagmuasha|ngochagmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngochagyaasha|ngochagyaasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongochagnkshĂ«asha|gongochagnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongochagnkroasha|gongochagnkroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongochagnkmuasha|gongochagnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongochagnkyaasha|gongochagnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:ngochachagasha|ngochachagasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngochachagshĂ«asha|ngochachagshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngochachagroasha|ngochachagroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngochachagmuasha|ngochachagmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngochachagyaasha|ngochachagyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongochachagnkshĂ«asha|gongochachagnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongochachagnkroasha|gongochachagnkroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongochachagnkmuasha|gongochachagnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongochachagnkyaasha|gongochachagnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:ngechĂŠgasha|ngechĂŠgasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngechĂŠgshĂ«asha|ngechĂŠgshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngechĂŠgroasha|ngechĂŠgroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngechĂŠgmuasha|ngechĂŠgmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngechĂŠgyaasha|ngechĂŠgyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongechĂŠgnkshĂ«asha|gongechĂŠgnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongechĂŠgnkroasha|gongechĂŠgnkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongechĂŠgnkmuasha|gongechĂŠgnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongechĂŠgnkyaasha|gongechĂŠgnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:ngochfagasha|ngochfagasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngochfagshĂ«asha|ngochfagshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngochfagroasha|ngochfagroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngochfagmuasha|ngochfagmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngochfagyaasha|ngochfagyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongochfagnkshĂ«asha|gongochfagnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongochfagnkroasha|gongochfagnkroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongochfagnkmuasha|gongochfagnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongochfagnkyaasha|gongochfagnkyaasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|b863984}}
